sections.paragraph:
fut. יִשְׁלַט Chald.-

(1) to rule, to have dominion, followed by בְּ over any thing, Dan 2:39 5:7 , 16 to have power over any thing, Dan 3:27.

(2) followed by בְּ to rush upon any thing, ibid., 6:25 .

Aphel, to cause to rule, to make ruler, followed by בְּ over any thing, Dan 2:38, 48 .
